name: rei-ignores
prompt: Medium shot from side. Silver-haired woman at window, back to glowing datapad on surface. Not looking at it. Eyes on the city outside. Choosing not to respond. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: rei-pov-dclass
prompt: Night cityscape through window glass. No people visible. D-Class Block building in the distance glowing with warm amber light against dark sky. Other buildings around it. Window frame visible at edges. Lonely distant view. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: rei-calculating
prompt: Close-up. Silver-haired woman's face reflected in window glass, ice-blue eyes distant, calculating. Thinking. A hundred touches that never cracked her. Thirty seconds that broke her. The math is wrong. Or it's finally right. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: glass-fogs
prompt: Extreme close-up. Window glass fogging beneath palm — warm, wanting. Condensation spreading. Heat she can't freeze. Evidence of something changed. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style
